5.description: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — Ohio serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Ohio. Free confidential 24/7 crisis support for people experiencing mental health emergencies, suicidal thoughts, or substance use crises. Trained counselors provide immediate support and can connect callers to local crisis services. Available to anyone in Ohio—not reentry-specific but essential for justice-involved individuals in crisis. Services are available on a sliding fee or Medicaid basis for eligible patients; bring ID and release paperwork when establishing care after incarceration. Contact the program to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
5.description_es: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline — Ohio sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en en todo Ohio. Los servicios están disponibles con tarifa móvil o Medicaid para pacientes elegibles; lleve identificación y documentos de liberación al establecer atención después de la encarcelación. Contacte el programa para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.

8.description: Certificate of Qualification for Employment (CQE) — Ohio DRC serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Ohio. Ohio's Certificate of Qualification for Employment program helps eligible individuals with criminal records obtain a certificate that can reduce automatic licensing and employment barriers. Administered through the Department of Rehabilitation and Correction with application guidance at drccqe.com. Representation is limited to civil legal matters—not active criminal cases. Income, household size, and offense type determine eligibility for record relief. Contact the program to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
8.description_es: Certificate of Qualification for Employment (CQE) — Ohio DRC ofrece asistencia legal civil gratuita o de bajo costo para residentes de bajos ingresos en en todo Ohio. Los abogados ayudan con sellado o eliminación de antecedentes, desalojos, beneficios y otros asuntos civiles—no casos penales activos. La representación se limita a asuntos legales civiles—no casos penales activos. Ingresos, tamaño del hogar y tipo de delito determinan la elegibilidad para alivio de antecedentes. Contacte la oficina para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.

9.description: Ohio Adult Parole Authority serves justice-involved adults and families rebuilding stability after incarceration in throughout Ohio. State agency responsible for parole supervision, parole board decisions, and community supervision of individuals released from Ohio prisons. Parole officers connect supervisees to reentry resources and enforce supervision conditions. Contact for supervision status, reporting requirements, and regional office locations. This office handles supervision compliance and reporting—not emergency reentry navigation; ask your officer for referrals to local reentry partners. Contact the program to confirm current intake steps, required documents, and whether walk-ins or referrals are accepted.
9.description_es: Ohio Adult Parole Authority sirve a adultos con antecedentes penales y familias que reconstruyen estabilidad después de la encarcelación en en todo Ohio. Esta oficina maneja cumplimiento de supervisión e informes—no navegación de crisis de reinserción; pida a su oficial referencias a aliados locales de reinserción. Contacte el programa para confirmar pasos de admisión, documentos requeridos y si aceptan visitas sin cita o referencias.

46.description: Clark County Department of Reentry is a statewide or regional referral resource for Ohioans affected by the criminal justice system. County reentry department coordinating services for justice-involved Clark County residents including referrals to housing, employment, treatment, and ID assistance. Works with the Clark County Reentry Coalition and community partners. Users can search by location, service type, or need to find active providers in Clark County. Specialists or online tools help match people to housing, treatment, employment, legal aid, or benefits programs operated by other organizations. This entry describes a navigation hub—staff here do not replace direct services at partner agencies.
46.description_es: Clark County Department of Reentry es un recurso de referencia estatal o regional para ohianos afectados por el sistema de justicia penal. Los usuarios pueden buscar por ubicación, tipo de servicio o necesidad para encontrar proveedores activos en condado de Clark. Herramientas en línea o especialistas ayudan a conectar con vivienda, tratamiento, empleo, asistencia legal o beneficios operados por otras organizaciones. Esta entrada describe un centro de navegación—el personal no reemplaza servicios directos en agencias aliadas.

47.description: Montgomery County Office of Reentry is a statewide or regional referral resource for Ohioans affected by the criminal justice system. This entry describes a navigation hub—staff here do not replace direct services at partner agencies.
